title: Mythic SMP Resource Pack
body:
This is the official resource pack, intended to be used on the Mythic SMP Minecraft server.

It adds textures for all custom items, staffs, runes, blocks, etc.

Feel free to look into the files and create your own add-on packs if you like! You can see some official add-on packs on our Modrinth profile [here](https://modrinth.com/user/MythicSMP)

Credits are on [Discord](https://discord.gg/sVP4apxU4S)!
